title: Application Development Intern
description: Developed internal applications that improved efficiency and reduced support requests.
Enhanced and maintained legacy web applications to improve user experience and workflows.
Built full-stack web application features using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, C#, .NET, and MS SQL.

title: BS Information Technology
description: Built a foundation in algorithms, database systems, web development, and software architecture.
Led the development of Sandro's Nook, an IoT-integrated smart transaction system for a café and bookstore.
Contributed to student leadership and campus initiatives as a College Student Council member.

title: Agent-In Customer Service 2
description: Resolved customer concerns through chat and phone support for online and in-store purchases.
Maintained a 5–6 minute average handling time while ensuring accurate documentation.
Consistently achieved performance targets and high customer satisfaction ratings.

title: Hello, World!
description: Every developer has a starting point — mine was a blinking cursor on a blank screen and a blank sheet of yellow paper. Writing that first line of code sparked a curiosity that never really left. What began as a simple print statement slowly opened the door to a much bigger world. That moment became the foundation for everything that followed.
